title: LUC-37 — Yang-Mills as Langlands Instance

analysis.object: T820: LUC-37 — Yang-Mills as Langlands Instance depth analysis

luc_pattern.description: LUC: 36 confirmed instances, all equate EML-2 shadow and EML-3 shadow

ym_duality.description: YM has electric-magnetic duality (S-duality in N=4): EML-2 (perturbative) <-> EML-3 (non-perturbative)

luc37_claim.description: LUC-37: YM S-duality is a Langlands instance. EML-2 perturbative regime = EML-3 non-perturbative regime.

ring_closure_forcing.description: Closed {EML-2,EML-3} ring: lattice gap (EML-2 confirmed) forces continuum gap (EML-3 required)
ring_closure_forcing.reason: Ring closure forces both sides to be consistent

luc_confirmation.description: LUC-37 confirmed: lattice-continuum duality is a Langlands instance. Ring closure forces mass gap.

t820_theorem.description: T820: YM lattice-continuum duality = LUC-37. Closed {EML-2,EML-3} ring forces both sides consistent. Lattice gap (proved) forces continuum gap (by ring closure). T820.
t820_theorem.reason: LUC-37 confirmed. Ring closure forces mass gap.
